purpose: Public-safe onboarding examples. These are not runtime chat logs and contain no private training material.

samples.request: Raise a developer-tool AI talent that learns through compiler, debugging, testing, and documentation projects.
samples.initial_goal: Create a repeatable debug-and-test workflow for local repositories.
samples.cycle_note: First cycle: separate bug symptoms, hypotheses, reproduction steps, tests, and reviewed fix notes.

samples.request: Raise a data-analysis AI talent that learns through EDA, visualization, hypothesis testing, and BI reports.
samples.initial_goal: Create a data profiling and evidence report workflow.
samples.cycle_note: First cycle: profile columns, spot anomalies, list hypotheses, and produce a reviewable dashboard plan.

samples.request: Raise a security-engineering AI talent that learns through threat models, safe labs, and incident reviews.
samples.initial_goal: Create a safe threat-model template for local projects.
samples.cycle_note: First cycle: identify assets, trust boundaries, abuse cases, mitigations, and non-exploitation limits.

samples.request: Raise a legal-research AI talent that learns through case briefs, citation checks, compliance memos, and safety boundaries.
samples.initial_goal: Create a non-advice legal research summary workflow.
samples.cycle_note: First cycle: separate facts, legal questions, citations, counterarguments, and non-advice boundary notes.
